description: Stream Live IPTV, Video On-Demand, and Series from an Xtream-compatible server using this plugin.
name: Jellyfin Xtream
overview: Stream content from an Xtream-compatible server.

versions.changelog:
## What's Changed
* Add multi-credential support and metadata refresh task by @benklop in https://github.com/klopstack/Jellyfin.Xtream/pull/1
* Bulk-renaming by @benklop in https://github.com/klopstack/Jellyfin.Xtream/pull/2
* Batch fetch epg data 1 by @benklop in https://github.com/klopstack/Jellyfin.Xtream/pull/3

## New Contributors
* @benklop made their first contribution in https://github.com/klopstack/Jellyfin.Xtream/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/klopstack/Jellyfin.Xtream/compare/v0.8.2...v0.9.0
